title: stachys recta subsp. doerfleri
intro: Stachys recta subsp. doerfleri, also known as Doerfler's betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys recta plant, a type of flowering herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, Doerfler's betony has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, relieving headaches and digestive issues, and promoting improved sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Doerfler's betony can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
